data.content: Implementation review approved. Verified the feat/foolery-23f3 worktree against the spec: per-row Add and registered controls are removed, Add All is removed, CLI rows show full binary paths, the option selector no longer shows agent.id, selected models render as pills, scan/add toolbar buttons use success-light and success variants, and OpenAI detection/labels now resolve to Codex including openai-path detection. Coverage now includes scanned-agents rendering/legacy-control removal/button variants plus agent-identity Codex detection. Validation in /Users/cartine/foolery-23f3: bun run lint (passes with 1 pre-existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx), bunx tsc --noEmit, and bun run test.
